name: Three-Camera Claw Machine
description: Operate an inertial six-axis claw through staggered top, front, and side CCTV feeds while threading a marked artifact through a physical obstacle cage.
natural_language: Retrieve the marked artifact using only the three camera feeds. Triangulate delayed views, accelerate and coast the claw, brake its inertia, close the gripper on geometric contact, carry the artifact clear of every obstacle, and release it fully inside the delivery chute.

metadata.variant_count_kind: 2 mirrors × 3 palettes × twelve independent 3-way bounded layout/camera/dynamics choices
metadata.notes: Every control is followed by an independently replayed inertial/coast tick; each CCTV feed exposes its delayed tick and a projection digest derived from the same 3D snapshot used for collisions and delivery.
